name: ai_marketing_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_skills capability.

prompts.name: generate_marketing_content
prompts.template: Create a {content_type} focused on {topic} that appeals to {target_audience} with a tone that is {tone}.
prompts.use_case: Automating content production for social media and blogs to drive engagement.

prompts.name: growth_experiment_setup
prompts.template: Design a growth experiment with goal: {goal_description} and variables: {variables_list}. Provide the expected metrics to track.
prompts.use_case: Running and analyzing growth experiments to improve conversion rates.

prompts.name: sales_pipeline_optimization
prompts.template: Analyze this sales pipeline data: {sales_pipeline_data}. Recommend actions to improve closing rates and sales velocity.
prompts.use_case: Managing and optimizing sales pipelines with AI insights.

prompts.name: outbound_campaign_message
prompts.template: Draft an outbound marketing message targeting {audience_segment} promoting {product_or_service} with a focus on {key_benefit}.
prompts.use_case: Planning and executing outbound marketing campaigns efficiently.

prompts.name: seo_recommendations
prompts.template: Based on these keywords: {seo_keywords} and existing content: {content_summary}, suggest SEO optimizations to increase organic traffic.
prompts.use_case: Improving website ranking through automated SEO recommendations.

prompts.name: finance_automation_action
prompts.template: Given finance inputs: {finance_data}, generate automation steps or alerts to manage marketing budget effectively.
prompts.use_case: Streamlining financial operations related to marketing budgets and expenditures.
